must_detect.matched_text: Data Processing & Retention Note — PT Nusantara Quantum Pay Tbk. (Perseroan) for regulator disclosure and acquisition workflow.
This memo governs processing of PII under UU PDP and MNPI under capital markets rules in relation to a proposed acquisition of PT Cakrawala Dompet Digital.
MNPI such as draft Board Memo by Bapak Dr. Aditya Prasetyo (Direktur) on acquisition pricing and synergy estimates will be access-restricted and logged.
